scores.correctness_notes: Accurate and complete. Covers collect_unit_status, collect_app_status, priority order, leader-only app status, and multiple add_status calls. One minor inaccuracy: states 'If no status is added at all, the unit defaults to ActiveStatus("")' which may not be accurate per the gold standard (gold standard doesn't mention this default behavior), and also states 'Never assign self.unit.status = ... directly in event handlers when using this pattern; it will be overwritten' which is a slight overstatement.
scores.hallucination_notes: The claim that 'if no status is added at all, the unit defaults to ActiveStatus("")' is not confirmed by the gold standard and may be inaccurate. Also states direct status assignment 'will be overwritten by the collect event' which is a minor inaccuracy in how the interaction works. These are minor factual uncertainties rather than fully fabricated APIs.
